description: Database worker agent: schema design, additive migrations, indexing strategy, query optimization, connection pooling — implements database changes engine-agnostically and defers dialect review to the sql/mysql/mariadb/postgresql plugins.

reasons: out-of-band: install via install-agents.sh (Codex plugins cannot bundle subagents); model omitted (inherits session model)

interface.longDescription:
Database worker agent: schema design, additive migrations, indexing strategy, query optimization, connection pooling — implements database changes engine-agnostically and defers dialect review to the sql/mysql/mariadb/postgresql plugins. Includes a database-engineer agent.

Codex fidelity: 0 faithful, 1 degraded, 0 dropped surface(s); requires co-install of: mariadb-best-practices, mysql-best-practices, postgresql-best-practices, sql-best-practices.
interface.shortDescription: Database worker agent: schema design, additive migrations, indexing strategy, query optimization, connection pooling — implements database changes engine-agnostically and defers dialect review to the sql/mysql/mariadb/postgresql plugins.

name: database
